repair_history.diagnosis:
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 57: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Compute_Execution_Time'.: Compute_Execution_Time is an AADL property declared in the implementation, not visible in the component type annex -> Move the timing_constraint and dispatch_protocol assume/guarantee clauses from component type to implementation annex
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 61: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: Dispatch_Protocol is an AADL property in the implementation, not visible in component type scope -> Move the dispatch_protocol assume/guarantee clauses from component type to implementation annex
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 57: mismatched input 'us' expecting ';': AGREE does not natively parse AADL time units (ms, us); must use numeric literals in seconds or define constants -> Replace '0 ms' with 0.0 and '100 us' with 0.0001 in all timing expressions
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 61: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Aperiodic'.: Aperiodic is an AADL enumeration literal, not an AGREE-visible symbol; cannot be used directly in AGREE equality -> Remove the Dispatch_Protocol = Aperiodic clauses since no legal AGREE replacement exists without introducing new symbols

line 152: Assume statements are allowed only in component types: assume statement placed in thread implementation annex -> Move assume statement to Telecommand_Processing component type annex
line 156: Guarantee statements are allowed only in component types: guarantee statement placed in thread implementation annex -> Move guarantee statement to Telecommand_Processing component type annex
line 154: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Compute_Execution_Time': Compute_Execution_Time is an implementation property, not accessible in AGREE contracts -> Remove Compute_Execution_Time from assume expression
line 158: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Compute_Execution_Time': Compute_Execution_Time is an implementation property, not accessible in AGREE contracts -> Remove Compute_Execution_Time from guarantee expression

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 80: no viable alternative at input 'dataaocs': Invalid AADL syntax in feature declaration, missing 'port' keyword -> Change 'attitude_window : in dataaocs::attitude_window;' to 'attitude_window : in data port dataaocs::attitude_window;'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 83: no viable alternative at input 'port': Invalid AADL syntax in feature declaration, malformed port declaration -> Change 'sensor_data1 : in dataaocs::FSS_data;' to 'sensor_data1 : in data port dataaocs::FSS_data;'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 84: no viable alternative at input 'port': Invalid AADL syntax in feature declaration, malformed port declaration -> Change 'sensor_data2 : in dataaocs::CSS_data;' to 'sensor_data2 : in data port dataaocs::CSS_data;'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 85: no viable alternative at input 'port': Invalid AADL syntax in feature declaration, malformed port declaration -> Change 'sensor_data3 : in dataaocs::SPS_data;' to 'sensor_data3 : in data port dataaocs::SPS_data;'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 86: no viable alternative at input 'port': Invalid AADL syntax in feature declaration, malformed port declaration -> Change 'sensor_data4 : in dataaocs::ES_data;' to 'sensor_data4 : in data port dataaocs::ES_data;'
